meaning: adj.中等大小的,中号的,中型的
examples: We have a special on the midsize car.
Fiat specializes in small and midsize cars.
All these over-the-top demands involved midsize to large companies.
New challenges are coming from smaller firms, such as Think3, that compete for midsize customers.
GM, after all, is a ready customer for those midsize cars it will be designing.
